2606.05025.title: Invariant Gradient Alignment for Robust Reasoning Distillation
2606.05025.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) suffer from shortcut learning: they systematically fail on out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs whose semantic surface differs from training data, even when the logical structure is identical. This undermines knowledge distillation pipelines that transfer chain-of-thought reasoning to smaller students. We introduce Invariant Gradient Alignment (IGA), a training framework that aligns gradient updates across semantically diverse but logically isomorphic examples via three innovations: (i) Logical Isomer Sets, groups of problems sharing identical logical structure across distinct semantic domains (mathematics, medicine, law, science); (ii) a differentiable \emph{Continuous Gradient Conflict Mask}, that suppresses parameter dimensions with high cross-domain gradient variance while preserving invariant directions; and (iii) a truncated SVD projection of the masked gradient back onto the LoRA low-rank manifold, maintaining parameter efficiency throughout. Theoretically, IGA yields tighter OOD generalization bounds than ERM, scaling with the number of isomer domains, and converges at the standard SGD rate under mild regularity. Empirically, IGA outperforms eight baselines across four benchmarks with accuracy gains up to 14.3 pp over ERM-SFT and a Logical Consistency Score of 0.031 versus 0.142 -- a fourfold improvement in representational invariance.
2606.05025.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）遭受捷徑學習的問題：它們在語義表面與訓練數據不同的分佈外（OOD）輸入上系統性地失敗，即使邏輯結構相同。這削弱了將思考鏈推理轉移到較小學生的知識蒸餾管道。我們介紹了不變梯度對齊（IGA），這是一個訓練框架，通過三項創新在語義多樣但邏輯同構的範例之間對齊梯度更新：(i) 邏輯異構體集，這些問題組在不同語義領域（數學、醫學、法律、科學）中共享相同的邏輯結構；(ii) 可微分的 \emph{連續梯度衝突掩碼}，它抑制具有高跨域梯度方差的參數維度，同時保留不變方向；以及 (iii) 將掩碼梯度截斷的 SVD 投影回 LoRA 低秩流形，整個過程保持參數效率。在理論上，IGA 產生比 ERM 更緊的 OOD 泛化界限，並隨著異構體領域的數量而擴展，並在輕微的正則性下以標準 SGD 速率收斂。在實證上，IGA 在四個基準上超越了八個基準，準確率較 ERM-SFT 提高了最多 14.3 個百分點，邏輯一致性得分為 0.031，相較於 0.142 -- 在表徵不變性方面提高了四倍。
2606.05025.author: Zehua Cheng et.al.
2606.05025.authors: Zehua Cheng, Wei Dai, Jiahao Sun
